LanguageData.VFES_PlatformTerrain.label: platform
LanguageData.VFES_TrenchTerrain.label: trench floor
LanguageData.VCE_TilledSoil.description: Tillage is the agricultural preparation of soil by mechanical agitation of various types, increasing terrain fertility. Tilling soil can only be done on normal soil (not rich soil). When a plant is harvested on a plowed soil, the floor becomes a normal soil again and needs to be plowed again manually.
LanguageData.VCE_TilledSoil.label: tilled soil
LanguageData.VCE_TilledSoil.tools.0.label: dirt
LanguageData.VFEArch_Asphalt.description: Industrial-style asphalt used to create roads and streets. Very easy to traverse for people and vehicles alike.
LanguageData.VFEArch_Asphalt.label: asphalt
LanguageData.VFEArch_CobblestoneFloorGranite.label: granite cobblestone floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_CobblestoneFloorLimestone.label: limestone cobblestone floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_CobblestoneFloorMarble.label: marble cobblestone floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_CobblestoneFloorSandstone.label: sandstone cobblestone floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_CobblestoneFloorSlate.label: slate cobblestone floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_PolishedStoneFloorGranite.label: granite polished stone floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_PolishedStoneFloorMarble.label: marble polished stone floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_PolishedStoneFloorSlate.label: slate polished stone floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_SlabsGranite.label: granite slabs
LanguageData.VFEArch_SlabsLimestone.label: limestone slabs
LanguageData.VFEArch_SlabsMarble.label: marble slabs
LanguageData.VFEArch_SlabsSandstone.label: sandstone slabs
LanguageData.VFEArch_SlabsSlate.label: slate slabs
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodenParquet.label: wooden parquet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodenParquetBirch.label: birch wooden parquet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodenParquetMahogany.label: mahogany wooden parquet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodenParquetWalnut.label: walnut wooden parquet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodPlankFloorBirch.description: Wood plank flooring for that warm, homey feeling. While it is quick to lay, it is also very flammable.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodPlankFloorBirch.label: birch wood floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodPlankFloorMahogany.descripti: Wood plank flooring for that warm, homey feeling. While it is quick to lay, it is also very flammable.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodPlankFloorMahogany.label: mahogany wood floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodPlankFloorWalnut.description: Wood plank flooring for that warm, homey feeling. While it is quick to lay, it is also very flammable.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodPlankFloorWalnut.label: walnut wood floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineWoodenFloor.description: Beautiful wooden parquet, made with no compromises, for expressing economic status. Slow to construct.
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineWoodenFloor.label: fine wooden floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineWoodenFloorBirch.description: Beautiful wooden parquet, made with no compromises, for expressing economic status. Slow to construct.
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineWoodenFloorBirch.label: birch fine wooden floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineWoodenFloorMahogany.descript: Beautiful wooden parquet, made with no compromises, for expressing economic status. Slow to construct.
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineWoodenFloorMahogany.label: mahogany fine wooden floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineWoodenFloorWalnut.descriptio: Beautiful wooden parquet, made with no compromises, for expressing economic status. Slow to construct.
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineWoodenFloorWalnut.label: walnut fine wooden floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_Grass.description: Field of grass with patches of soil here and there. Very pleasant to look at, it requires no resources to construct.
LanguageData.VFEArch_Grass.label: grass
LanguageData.VFEArch_Grass.tools.0.label: dirt
LanguageData.VFEArch_LawnPlot.description: Beautifully trimmed grass with very high beauty value. Requires tremendous amounts of work to construct.
LanguageData.VFEArch_LawnPlot.label: lawn plot
LanguageData.VFEArch_LawnPlot.tools.0.label: dirt
LanguageData.VFEArch_PlayerBrokenAsphalt.description: Old, broken apart asphalt, often found in the form of ancient highways around abandoned locations. Very easy to traverse for people and vehicles alike.
LanguageData.VFEArch_PlayerBrokenAsphalt.label: broken asphalt
LanguageData.VFEArch_PlayerPackedDirt.description: Packed dirt, slightly enhancing movement speed, often forming paths around places of interest.
LanguageData.VFEArch_PlayerPackedDirt.label: packed dirt
LanguageData.VFEArch_BridgeGranite.label: granite bridge
LanguageData.VFEArch_BridgeLimestone.label: limestone bridge
LanguageData.VFEArch_BridgeMarble.label: marble bridge
LanguageData.VFEArch_BridgeSandstone.label: sandstone bridge
LanguageData.VFEArch_BridgeSlate.label: slate bridge
LanguageData.VFEArch_BridgeSteel.label: steel bridge
LanguageData.VFEArch_ConcreteFoundation.description: Foundations are structures that can be built on mud, quicksand etc. Foundation allows more rapid movement across these normally slowing ground types. Once built, they can support many structures, including heavy structures and any other type of wall. Foundations allow for easier building in desert and swampy biomes. Floors cannot be built atop foundations.
LanguageData.VFEArch_ConcreteFoundation.label: concrete foundation
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetBlue.description: Toe-hugging wooly carpet in a cool blue color.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetBlue.label: blue wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetBrown.description: Cheap looking, industry standard carpets for not-so-fancy places.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetBrown.label: brown wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetCream.label: cream wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetDark.label: dark wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetDarkRed.description: Wooly carpet in a cozy dark shade of red.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetDarkRed.label: dark red wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetGreen.description: Naturalistic-feeling green wooly carpet. Earth tones, dude.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetGreen.label: green wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetGreenish.description: Neutral green carpet, excellent for hotels and beds and breakfasts.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetGreenish.label: greenish wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetOrange.description: Eccentric orange carpet for the business board rooms.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetOrange.label: orange wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetPurple.description: Soft purple carpet for the cozy bedroom look.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetPurple.label: purple wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetRed.description: Wooly carpet in a lovely rose hue.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetRed.label: red wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetWhite.description: Corporate, hard to clean white wooly carpet.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetWhite.label: white wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetYellow.label: yellow wooly carpet
LanguageData.VME_CorporateFineTileGranite.label: corporate fine granite tile
LanguageData.VME_CorporateFineTileLimestone.label: corporate fine limestone tile
LanguageData.VME_CorporateFineTileMarble.label: corporate fine marble tile
LanguageData.VME_CorporateFineTileSandstone.label: corporate fine sandstone tile
LanguageData.VME_CorporateFineTileSlate.label: corporate fine slate tile
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoCarpetBlue.description: Toe-hugging plush carpet in a cool blue color.
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoCarpetBlue.label: shintao blue carpet
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoCarpetCream.label: shintao cream carpet
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoCarpetDark.label: shintao dark carpet
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoCarpetFineBurgundy.descriptio: Classic burgundy carpet for that classic rich look.
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoCarpetFineBurgundy.label: fine shintao burgundy carpet
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoCarpetFineIndigo.description: Soft and silky indigo carpet, for that extra sense of pomp.
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoCarpetFineIndigo.label: fine shintao indigo carpet
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoCarpetFineWhite.description: Sublime white carpet, glimmering with subtle patterns.
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoCarpetFineWhite.label: fine shintao white carpet
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoCarpetGreen.description: Naturalistic-feeling green carpet. Earth tones, dude.
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoCarpetGreen.label: shintao green carpet
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoCarpetRed.description: Plush carpet in a lovely rose hue.
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoCarpetRed.label: shintao red carpet
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoFineTileGranite.label: shintao fine granite tile
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoFineTileLimestone.label: shintao fine limestone tile
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoFineTileMarble.label: shintao fine marble tile
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoFineTileSandstone.label: shintao fine sandstone tile
LanguageData.VME_ShintaoFineTileSlate.label: shintao fine slate tile
LanguageData.GR_CrackedConcrete.description: Rough concrete. Broken due to lack of maintenance.
LanguageData.GR_CrackedConcrete.label: cracked concrete
LanguageData.GR_MechTile.label: mech laboratory tile
LanguageData.GR_PavedTile.label: rusted laboratory tile
LanguageData.GR_PavedTileClean.label: laboratory tile
LanguageData.GR_RustedMechTile.label: rusted mech laboratory tile
LanguageData.GR_WhiteTile.label: white laboratory tile
LanguageData.VFEE_ThickAsh.description: Burned-out thick layer of ash and glass shards.
LanguageData.VFEE_ThickAsh.label: thick ash
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_TrashBrickFloor.description: A rough floor made with trashbricks. Not pretty, but cheap to make.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_TrashBrickFloor.label: trashbrick floor
LanguageData.AM_BlackTile.description: Common ceramic tiles in the city.
LanguageData.AM_BlackTile.label: ceramic tile（black）
LanguageData.AM_RCFloor.label: reinforced concrete floor
LanguageData.AM_Tile.description: Common striped tiles in fast food restaurants.
LanguageData.AM_Tile.label: striped ceramic tiles
LanguageData.AM_WhiteTile.description: Common ceramic tiles in the city.
LanguageData.AM_WhiteTile.label: ceramic tile
LanguageData.VFEM2_Matting_Burned.description: Leather matting that has been burned in a fire.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Matting_Burned.label: burned matting
LanguageData.VFEM2_FineMatting_Burned.description: Luxurious leather matting that has been burned in a fire.
LanguageData.VFEM2_FineMatting_Burned.label: burned fine matting
LanguageData.VQE_AncientCarpet.label: ancient carpet
LanguageData.VQE_AncientFrozenHullTile.description: An ancient frozen hull tile of a colossal spacecraft.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientFrozenHullTile.label: ancient frozen hull tile
LanguageData.VQE_AncientHullTile.description: An ancient hull tile of a colossal spacecraft.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientHullTile.label: ancient hull tile
LanguageData.VQED_AncientHullTile.description: Rusted tiles of an ancient silo.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientHullTile.label: ancient silo tile
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMetalGrate.description: Ancient, rusted metal grates with some machinery visible underneath.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMetalGrate.label: ancient metal grate
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSterileTile.description: Ancient sterile tiles with special cleanliness-enhancing properties. Now heavily rusted, with old blood stains still present.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSterileTile.label: ancient sterile tile
LanguageData.VQED_EerieFloor.description: Mysterious floor of an unknown origin, with eerily smooth surface and etchings.
LanguageData.VQED_EerieFloor.label: eerie floor
LanguageData.VGE_AncientOrbitalPlatform.label: ancient orbital platform
LanguageData.VGE_AsteroidIce.label: asteroid ice
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Vacstone_Floor.label: compressed vacstone
LanguageData.VGE_DamagedSubstructure.description: A warped and twisted section of gravship substructure. Once a solid truss with decking, it has been bent out of shape by heavy stress or impact. The grav engine’s levitation field still grips it, but its integrity is compromised: any further damage will cause this piece of substructure to collapse completely.
LanguageData.VGE_DamagedSubstructure.label: damaged gravship substructure
LanguageData.VGE_FakeTerrain.label: fake terrain
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipSubscaffold.description: A scaffold layer built to support the framework of gravships. While part of the gravship’s structure, it cannot support buildings and slows movement significantly. It does not count toward the gravship’s substructure limit, making it ideal for walkways, access paths, or expansion staging areas.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipSubscaffold.label: gravship subscaffold
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidSubstructure.description: A mechanoid-made lightweight truss structure with flooring on top that forms the deck of a swarmship. Only things on top of this substructure can be lifted by the grav engine's levitation field.
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidSubstructure.label: mechanoid substructure
LanguageData.VQED_AncientHospitalFloor.description: An ancient hospital vinyl flooring. Some faded blood can still be seen on it.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientHospitalFloor.label: ancient hospital floor
LanguageData.VQED_AncientNurseryCarpet.label: ancient nursery carpet
LanguageData.VQED_AncientReinforcedConcrete.descripti: An ancient reinforced concrete floor. It’s old and ugly.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientReinforcedConcrete.label: ancient reinforced concrete
LanguageData.VEE_AnimaCrackedSoil.label: cracked anima soil
LanguageData.VEE_AnimaCrackedSoil.tools.0.label: mud

LanguageData.VEE_AnimaSoilRich.tools.0.label: dirt

LanguageData.VEE_SwampyWaterMovingChestDeep.label: chest-deep swampy moving water
LanguageData.VEE_SwampyWaterMovingShallow.label: shallow swampy moving water
LanguageData.VFEF_FactoryFloor.description: Reinforced steel flooring capable of supporting factory buildings. Slow to traverse and ugly to look at.
LanguageData.VFEF_FactoryFloor.label: factory floor
LanguageData.DBHMosaicGranite.label: granite mosaic tile
LanguageData.DBHMosaicLimestone.label: limestone mosaic tile
LanguageData.DBHMosaicMarble.label: marble mosaic tile
LanguageData.DBHMosaicSandstone.label: sandstone mosaic tile
LanguageData.DBHMosaicSlate.label: slate mosaic tile
LanguageData.DBHMosaicTile.description: Steel tiles in a mosaic pattern, stylish in bathrooms or kitchens.
LanguageData.DBHMosaicTile.label: mosaic tile
LanguageData.PoolWater.label: pool water
